title: schiedea sarmentosa
intro: Schiedea sarmentosa, also known as the 'haele' or 'maile fern', is a rare and endemic flowering plant species native to Hawaii. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Schiedea sarmentosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and support wound healing. In herbal preparations, Schiedea sarmentosa is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
